text: Study human-handoff-banner drift: gated human actions (build/test/commit/push/merge/PR) rendered as prose instead of TOOL(human-handoff). Design a mechanical check (R_HANDOFF_SURFACED verifier rule or coherence-lint extension) that flags prose-handoff phrases not wrapped in a handoff render. Same root-cause family as artifact-identity + DAG drift: convention not enforced.

Strengthen artifact-identity enforcement: lint-commit-trailer must scan the commit-message BODY (not just trailers) for brand self-references (Claude/Copilot/GPT/'Claude Code') + 'PR-N'; wire it as a REAL pre-push/pre-commit gate that BLOCKS (the manual grep && echo guard is cosmetic — it doesn't halt the push). Root incident: commit 9de380f leaked 'Claude Code' into the body 2026-05-26.

Fix lint_paths.py to skip gitignored files (workspace/memory/working|longterm session state with /mnt/c paths) so the pre-commit pre-commit-stage hook can be re-activated without false-positive-blocking every commit. Then re-enable: pre-commit install --hook-type pre-commit.
Dual-agent benchmark: wire the rigorous AXON arm — Agent-A calls real AXON tools over mcp-client (not just the AXON-discipline system prompt). Then re-run to get the true H1 number.

axon-million PROOF pillar: run the dual-agent benchmark LIVE (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + budget; >=15-20 goals x2 arms to clear the 95% CI lower-bound>0.5 bar). Wedge is done; this is THE bottleneck for the million thesis. Clear with: todo done <id>

Gate-before-commit blind spot: lint_paths scans only git-TRACKED files + commit-trailer --range scans only committed commits, so new untracked files / the pending commit aren't seen at the pre-commit crucible gate — they surface on the NEXT gate (hit 2x: commit-trailer, then project-refresh tripped lint-paths post-merge). Fix: a pre-commit-aware lint over staged+untracked in the gate, OR stage-then-gate. Low severity, real.

axon-million PROOF: PAUSED pending TNO discussion — choose run option A (API key, pay-per-token, bare-model base) vs B (Pro/Max subscription via claude-cli, agent base). Machinery DONE + runnable: objective MMS grader + preflight + prereg + 2 fields (heat+advdiff) + 12 goals (conclusive-capable at win-rate 0.85), BOTH backends merged (MR !20-!25). Internal guide: /home/arturcastiel/projects/new-axon/AXON-benchmark-guide.md. AFTER discussion: pick option+model -> prereg -> run-mms -> bring verdict back to interpret. NOT yet run. AXON arm still prompt-level (B3 full-MCP arm open: todo 43b4bf4b). Full state: memory session-state-2026-05-28-proof-next.

Wire the Buckley-Leverett analytical oracle into the run-mms harness: generalize the goal dispatch so run_mms_fixtures grades BL goals (proof_bl.grade — L1 + shock-front) alongside MMS goals (proof_mms.grade — order-fit); the two graders have different signatures. Then BL goals (M in {1.5,2,3,5}) can join the benchmark goal set — a 3rd oracle TYPE + more breadth. Oracle DONE + merged (tag v3.8.0-dev-proof-bl-oracle); only the harness dispatch remains.

COMPILED-MIRROR KILL (owner decision 2026-05-28) — focused-session workstream, NOT a delete (gate-protected, ~40 files). KEY COUPLING found: compile_suggest.py POPULATES dispatch's index (register_in_dispatch_index -> memory/longterm/dispatch-index.json) as a compile side-effect, and dispatch.py reads it -> STEP 0 = decouple: build the dispatch index from program SOURCE (workspace/programs/*.md name+description), independent of compilation. THEN: (1) dispatch.py run-target compiled->source + remove prefer_compiled (read/bypass/output) + docstring. (2) rm workspace/programs/compiled/ (49 .cmp.md). (3) rm the 5 compile tools (compile, compile_suggest [after step 0], compile_optimizer, compile-write, audit_compiled — no import ripple) + their REGISTRY.json entries. (4) rm 4 machinery test files (~23 tests: test_compile_write/_audit_compiled/_compiled_freshness/_compiled_regression). (5) drop prefer-compiled from smart-dispatch.md; retire suggest-compile.md + stats.md compiled bits. (6) clean programs_registry.py (compiled field) + axon_audit.py (compiled count) — both degrade gracefully today. (7) drop compiled-coverage from metrics_manifest.json. (8) update AXON-DOCS-COMPILER.md + REGISTRY.md + AXON-DOCS-*. (9) gate: registry-drift + doc_counts + freshness. run.py STAYS (executes source .md). A partial attempt was reverted 2026-05-28 on finding the index coupling (no half-kill left).

Lane 1 remaining (optional breadth, lower-value than what's built): (a) a 3rd MMS field — reaction-diffusion (u_t=alpha*u_xx+k*u+f, low-risk heat-analog) or wave (hyperbolic, 2nd-order time, more distinct); (b) property oracles (mass/energy conservation, symmetry) = methodology oracle-TYPE 3, field-agnostic. Proof already spans heat+advdiff (MMS) + Buckley-Leverett (analytical/shock), all runnable via run-mms --goals. Do AFTER the pilot confirms an effect exists (don't over-build past the live-run bottleneck).

general-bugfix PR-0d: apply the 6-line kernel patch to axon/programs/interactive.md (spec: dev-projects/general-bugfix/03-prs/PR-0d-kernel-patch.md), push to general-bugfix/pr-0d-mirror-kill, gate green, squash-merge MR !162. Then mark todo 20166489 (compiled-mirror kill) done.

general-bugfix PR-2 kernel half: run apply-pr2b-kernel-repoint.sh (dev-projects/general-bugfix/03-prs/) — repoints 13 kernel chat/plan path refs, promotes lint-path-vars to BLOCK, merges the held mode-wiring branch. One command.
general-bugfix follow-up A: migrate the 27 literal _meta REPLACE call-sites to TOOL(meta, set), then flip residue-lint WARN→BLOCK (its promotes_on condition). Census: residue-lint report.

general-bugfix follow-up B (reduce-surface round 2): freeze/thaw↔hold + divide/combine↔partition de-dup · phases/{name}/ dir retirement (5 consumers: hold/cascade/explain-reviewer/dont-do/journal-search) · workflow simulate/run implementation fold · full route-manifest. Each its own gated PR.

O2 axon-hr-ui — COLD-START STRANGER TEST: sit a real NON-AUTHOR (TNO colleague/junior/AI researcher) at a fresh terminal, they boot AXON cold with ZERO coaching from you; then run my-axon/dev-projects/axon-hr-ui/O2-stranger-test.sh in a NORMAL terminal (not via !) to log time-to-first-task / confusion / abandonment. Gates the onboarding tier (PR-014). Only matters if AXON will be shared beyond you — if it stays author-only, drop O2 + the onboarding tier instead.

axon-hr-ui FLAKY GATE: crucible pytest control (python3 -m pytest tests/ -n auto -q -p no:cacheprovider) is non-deterministic — false RED on a verifiably-green tree (4819 passed on re-run, same cmd). Blocks valid merges + undermines ship.sh. Root: test pollution under xdist parallel workers (shared compiled artifacts / dispatch index / episodic logs), beyond the already-disabled cache. FIX: isolate the polluting tests (tmp_path / per-worker dirs) OR mark the gate retry-once-on-flake. On-theme: a gate giving false signal is exactly what this project hunts.

PR-019 (axon-hr-ui) ROOT CAUSE (precise, 2026-06-23): code-dev-study.md:92-95 dispatches modes subsystem/deep/targeted/compare to code-dev-study-area then DONE() — EXITING before the phase-manifest advance at line 528. So the ladder advance ONLY runs on the no-flag interactive path; under mode flags the manifest never advances (the real rank-3 false-negative, NOT just an emits/header mismatch). Compounding: mode path writes study/<mode>.md but manifest output (from '# emits: 01-study.md') is 01-study.md (root) — different file+dir. FIX (3 parts, back-compat-sensitive: 01-study.md read at lines 118/521): (a) advance the manifest on the mode-dispatch path too (likely inside code-dev-study-area after its write, mode-aware output); (b) reconcile outputs — needs OR-semantics (01-study.md OR study/*.md) which _missing_outputs lacks, OR unify the output location; (c) program-execution test (needs a markdown runner — gap-find flagged this gap). Do as a FOCUSED effort, not marathon-tail. Lower-risk W1 alt: PR-009b (termination tests + Skip-to-next no-op fix).
